title: epiphyllum phyllanthus subsp. guatemalense
intro: Epiphyllum phyllanthus subsp. guatemalense is a rare and lesser-known species of the Epiphyllum genus, commonly referred to as the 'Guatemalan Orchid Cactus'. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Epiphyllum phyllanthus subsp. guatemalense are said to include wound healing, antiseptic properties, and potential anti-cancer effects. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made from its stems and leaves, and are often used in traditional folk medicine to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
